fields.summary: Provides options that control the creation of XPS documents.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions" /> controls the output quality and compatibility settings when creating an XPS document with <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocument" />. Set the desired DPI and whether images may be serialized without PNG encoding.

## Examples

```csharp
var options = new SKDocumentXpsOptions
{
    DPI = 300,
    AllowNoPngs = false
};
using var stream = File.OpenWrite("output.xps");
using var document = SKDocument.CreateXps(stream, options.DPI);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether images may be written without PNG encoding.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> to allow non-PNG image serialization; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the dots-per-inch (DPI) resolution for the XPS document.
fields.value: The DPI resolution. The default is 0 (use the system or driver default).

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the objects are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
